title: Purification and quantification from  PCR amplification protocol

steps: Prepare collection tubes for each sample with their corresponding columns
Add 500 μL of capture buffer on each column
Slowly mix the solution using a micropipette.
Keep the DNA in the column and discard the flow through on the tube
Add 500 μL of washing buffer on the column
Incubate for 1 min at room temperature
Transfer the column into a new tube
To visualize the amplified products, put 2 μL of the PCR product with 2 μL of loading buffer dye in agarose gel electrophoresis with 1X TBE stained with SYBER safe at 1:10000.
To compare, add 1 μL of 1kb DNA ladder (final concentration 0,5 ng/μL) and observe a band of 1500 pb approximately.
Incubate for 2 min at room temperature
Discard the columns and keep the tubes with purified DNA at 4 °C until visualization
creator: Rene Flores Clavo
